title: GATE-4 bot identity record
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL='\n'
queue_path=Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue=json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks':[]}
if not any(t.get('id')=='GATE-4' for t in queue.get('tasks',[])):
    queue.setdefault('tasks',[]).append({'id':'GATE-4','title':'Telegram receipt proof','status':'IN_PROGRESS','priority':1,'depends_on':['GATE-3'],'criteria':'Telegram bot identity is known and a real message receipt/response proof is recorded','touch_workflows':False})
for task in queue.get('tasks',[]):
    if task.get('id')=='GATE-4':
        task['status']='IN_PROGRESS'
        task['bot_username']='@BarberStaffBot'
        task['operator_screenshot_received']=True
        task['proof_status']='identity_known_response_not_yet_recorded'
        task['updated_at']='2026-06-04T16:01:00Z'
queue['updated_at']='2026-06-04T16:01:00Z'
queue['queue_state']='HAS_PENDING_OPERATOR_RECEIPT'
queue['next_action']='record Telegram response receipt when available; do not mark Gate 4 PASS from bot profile screenshot alone'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+NL,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
state=Path('governance/state/GATE4_TELEGRAM_BOT_IDENTITY_RECORD.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4','trace_id':'gate4_telegram_bot_identity_record','status':'in_progress','release_pass':False,'bot_username':'@BarberStaffBot','evidence':'operator screenshot of Telegram bot profile','gate_decision':'not_pass_until_real_message_response_receipt','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'record Telegram message receipt/response proof'},ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+NL,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report=Path('governance/reports/GATE4_TELEGRAM_BOT_IDENTITY_RECORD.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# GATE-4 | Telegram bot identity record'+NL+'Status: in_progress'+NL+'Date: 2026-06-04'+NL+NL+'## Evidence'+NL+'Operator screenshot identifies the Telegram bot username as `@BarberStaffBot`.'+NL+NL+'## Gate decision'+NL+'Gate 4 is not PASS yet. A bot profile screenshot proves identity, but not live message handling. PASS requires a real receipt/response proof from Telegram integration.'+NL+NL+'## Workflow lock'+NL+'Respected. No `.github/workflows/*.yml` files touched.'+NL+NL+'## Next'+NL+'Record Telegram message receipt/response proof when available.'+NL,encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
